title: Creamy Syrian Bowtie Pasta
description: A cultured and romantic Syrian dish featuring bowtie pasta in a rich and creamy soffritto-based sauce, perfect for special occasions.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the bowtie pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and add the chopped carrots and celery, cooking until they are tender.
Add the sliced mushrooms to the skillet and cook until they release their moisture and start to brown.
In a small bowl, whisk together the heavy cream, parmesan cheese, thyme, salt, and pepper.
Add the cream mixture to the skillet and stir to combine, bringing the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the sauce simmer for a few minutes until it has thickened slightly.
Drain the cooked pasta and add it to the skillet, tossing to combine with the creamy sauce.
Serve the pasta hot, garnished with additional parmesan cheese if desired.
